"We have checked our systems and the only personal data of yours that we hold are records and correspondence generated by or associated with the instant data subject access request. We do not hold or process any other personal data of yours."  

Not the first time someone says that on the first day that readership tanks in months, so gonna need a better answer for who does scrape in your network, because someone's already openly tried to commercialise it.
